name: tapsmith
description: Mobile app testing framework — TypeScript SDK and test runner

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && chmod +x dist/cli.js && mkdir -p dist/proto && cp ../../proto/tapsmith.proto dist/proto/ && npm run build:agents && npm run build:ios-agent-src && npm run build:trace-viewer && npm run build:ui-mode
scripts.build:agents: mkdir -p dist/agents/android && cp ../../agent/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk dist/agents/android/ 2>/dev/null && cp ../../agent/app/build/outputs/apk/androidTest/debug/app-debug-androidTest.apk dist/agents/android/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build:ios-agent-src: mkdir -p dist/ios-agent && cp -r ../../ios-agent/TapsmithAgent dist/ios-agent/ && cp -r ../../ios-agent/TapsmithAgent.xcodeproj dist/ios-agent/ && cp ../../ios-agent/create-xcode-project.sh dist/ios-agent/ && cp ../../ios-agent/Package.swift dist/ios-agent/ 2>/dev/null || true

author: Sam Smith <sam@sammysmith.co.uk>
